description: Research Privacy Impact Assessments (PIA) methodology, focusing on its purpose, process, and key components.
Investigate Risk Assessment methodologies, including types of risk assessments and their applications in data protection.
Explore Security Assessment methodologies, detailing their frameworks, processes, and relevance to data protection.
Compare and contrast PIA, Risk Assessments, and Security Assessments to identify similarities and differences in their approaches to data protection.
Collect case studies or examples of organizations implementing these methodologies in data protection assessments.
Summarize findings and prepare a focused analysis report on the methodologies related to data protection assessments.
